title: papaver alpinum subvar. biconvex
intro: Papaver alpinum subvar. biconvex, also known as alpine poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family Papaveraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Papaver alpinum subvar. biconvex include relief from insomnia, anxiety, and muscle spasms, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
